# Duplicate Elements Test

Two identical sidebars:

<nav><ul><li>Home</li><li>About</li></ul></nav>

Some content between them.

<nav><ul><li>Home</li><li>About</li></ul></nav>

Three identical buttons:

<button>Submit</button>
<button>Submit</button>
<button>Submit</button>

Two identical forms:

<form><input type="text"><button>Send</button></form>

Paragraph break.

<form><input type="text"><button>Send</button></form>
